steps.rationale: Keep the stronger Whisper baseline but shift generation toward fuller chart-ready capture by preserving more quiet context and using a more complete note style.
steps.judge_justification: This is a strong, mostly accurate clinical note that captures the key encounter facts and presents them in a clean SOAP format. Its main weaknesses are modest omissions in assessment/plan nuance and an inappropriate meta-evaluative closing sentence that breaks clinical tone and polish.

steps.rationale: Test parakeet with recall-friendly cleanup and a detailed note style to improve allergy, vitals, and return-precaution capture without enhancement artifacts.
steps.judge_justification: The artifact captures the broad diagnosis and some core symptoms, but it misses too many clinically important details and return precautions to match the expected note well. Its SOAP structure helps readability, yet the note is weakened by omissions, generic planning, and unprofessional transcript-leakage language.

steps.rationale: Swap to parakeet and tighten preprocessing to reduce stray multilingual fragments, transcript leakage, and awkward note wording caused by noisy spans.
steps.judge_justification: This artifact has a recognizable SOAP structure and preserves the broad diagnosis and some major symptoms, but it falls well short of the expected note on factual completeness and clinical polish. The biggest problems are omission of key vitals, exam findings, allergy and medication details, and especially the weak follow-up and missing explicit return precautions. Non-clinical transcript leakage and meta commentary further reduce confidence and chart-readiness.
